titleStmt.title: SII 28.142: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 142. (A.R. No. 297 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records the order (olai) issued by Kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ approving the arrangement made by the authorities concerned with the temple to set apart a portion of the land of 2 vēli in extent till then being enjoyed tax-free as archchanā-bhōgam (for meeting the expenses of worship) by the temple for the conduct of festivals in the temple of Tiruchchiṟṟambala-mākāḷi, whose shrine seems to have been situated on the southern side of the south street called Vikrama-chōḻaṉ-teṅgu-tiruvīti, along which the main deity of the place (Nāyakkar) was taken in procession for the bath in the sea (tirukkaḍal-tīṟttham-prasādikka). The balance of the proceeds from that 2 vēli after meeting the above-stated expenses, was to be utilised to provide rice to several shrines (pala-dēvargaḷukku) which was till then arranged for the main storehouse (perumpaṇḍāram) of Tillai-nāyakaṉ, from the next year (the year opposite to the eighth). This order was to be inscribed in the Vikkirama-chōḻaṉ-tirumāḷigai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § śrīmatkirtikkumel koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ Olai jayatuṅka pallavaraiyarum kurukulattaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalam muṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum ñ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārap pottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum
kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu nāyakar tirukkaṭal tirttham prasātikka Eḻuntaruḷum vikramacoḻaṉ teṅku tiruvītikku teṉpakkattu mutaliyār tirunāmattāl tirucciṟṟampala pratiṣṭittu pūjai koṇṭu potukiṟa tirucciṟṟampala mākāḷikku perumpaṟṟappuliyūr ka lum palakaṭṭaḷaikaḷilu ṇi koṇṭu Arccanāpoka Iṟaiyiliyākak kalveṭṭa
Arccaṉaikkuṭalāka Eṭṭāvatu varaiyum Aṉupavittu varukiṟa Ūrppaṭi nilam Iruveliyil Ittirucciṟṟampala mākāḷi koyil tiruppaṇikkum Utsavaṅkaḷukkum veṇṭum vaiyiṟṟukku Uṭalāka nikkina nilam Araiye Irumāvarai nikki nilam Oṉṟe Eḻumā Araiyum muṉpu palatevarkaḷukku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nilam Uṭal koṇṭa tiru
nāmattukkāṇi Uṭaṉe kūṭṭi Ittevarkaḷukku tillaināyakaṉ perumpaṇṭārattu Ariciyiṭṭu potukiṟapaṭiye Eṭṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu mutal tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka paṇṭārattu [kola koṇṭu] tirucciṟṟampala mākāḷikku Arccaṉaikku Uṭalāka rici] tillaivaṉamuṭaiya parameśvara koilk kollaviramuṭaiyārkku Arici viṭṭu potukiṟapaṭiye nāḷ Oṉṟukku celavu rācake
cariyāl Arici Aṟunāḻiyum Arici Opāti pākku veṟṟilaiyum Eṇṇaipaṇṭārattu viṭṭu potukiṟapaṭiye Eṇṇaiyum pala paṇṭāraṅkaḷilum viṭavum Ippaṭikku Ittirucciṟṟampala mākāḷi koyillukku vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaippuṟavāyilil Ikkalveṭṭiṉa Iṭatte Ikkalveṭṭavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭikku Ivai(pa)kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ḥ—
Digital edition of SII 28.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
